3143240.name: To The Grave: The Wildlands of Faenora Demo
3143240.description: Experience the thrill of "To The Grave: The Wildlands of Faenora" in our demo! Dive into the world of Faenora, where you’ll lead a squad through a tactical RPG roguelite adventure filled with randomized encounters, strategic turn-based combat, and deep customization. Customize your hero and allies, make impactful choices, and endure the Wildlands to conquer the wild Gryphon. Each playthrough offers a new path and challenges. Get a taste of the adventure to come in the full game - one that's dangerously cute and strategically challenging!
